item.name: Logistics System Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your reprogrammed logistics system will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Logistics System
mount.action: Call into battle your Allagan logistics system. For your safety and the safety of those around you, all weaponry has been disabled.
mount.description: One of the automated system drones deployed by the Allagans to maintain and protect their strongholds. After being unearthed by the Sons of Saint Coinach, the mechanical sphere was modified by Nero tol Scaeva into a personal transportation device.
mount.tooltip:
Her report also mentions a
violent encounter with a
sentry heavily augmented
by Allagan technology...
- Rammbroes
